Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Great Elder]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Great Elder personally blighted the weather when the Emperor struck down Kthanikahr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The island is haunted by a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — A mortal man can be bound to the heart of a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Reading the body of a Great Elder is described as something Calder avoids.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — A Great Elder can have a wrath that people fear to incur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Great Elder has a voice that can be recognized since childhood.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — An island is made from the corpse of a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Great Elders possess powers that can be countered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — A Great Elder can possess a will that few humans can resist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Great Elders seek to be free again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor's long life comes from a Great Elder.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — A Great Elder granted Calder an Awakened blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Mentioning a Great Elder causes the voice of the transmission to quiver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — A Great Elder could potentially turn subordinates into dogs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — A Great Elder was spying on Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — A Great Elder may have revived in Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — The library likely has connections to a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Great Elders are unique in purpose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder believes the Great Elder would not be wrong.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — A Great Elder moved openly for the first time in five years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — The open eye symbol represents the all-seeing eyes of the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — A Great Elder can spawn focused creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — A Great Elder's presence can make reality shake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — A Great Elder can have tentacles as limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — The Great Elder is an entity composed of limbs, tentacles, claws, and sensory organs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — The Great Elder has an aura of knowledge that hangs around it like a fog.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — The Emperor once opposed a Great Elder creator in a frontal contest and walked away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Othaghor is a Great Elder.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Great Elder's words carry volumes of meaning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Great Elders are entities that might seek the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Great Elders are what Ozriel calls Class One Fiends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — No unusual activity has been detected from the Great Elder since the night of the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Great Elder's presence can infect everything and choke the life from a Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Great Elder can be attracted by noise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — A Great Elder can lash out with full power into reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — A Great Elder is clashing overhead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Great Elders can enter human vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Humans have been known to fight for a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Great Elder was on the defensive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — A Great Elder is arriving ahead of schedule.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — When a Great Elder is killed, their Intent slowly dissipates over a long time.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Great Elders can tear apart human minds and bodies easily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Regents appear to stop rising Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor carries a Great Elder's heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — There are very few combatants capable of scoring a blow on a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera is fighting a Great Elder tomorrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin struck against the Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — A Great Elder can inhabit a host's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The Great Elder can bypass the mind and reach muscles directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The Great Elder focused on Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — A Great Elder is clashing against an opponent of impossible power beyond the borders of existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — A Great Elder can resurrect someone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Calder resisted the call of the Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — The statues were meant to defend against the possible rising of a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — The Great Elder can be drowned in acidic darkness by Jorin's power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
